citations.note: Section 2(a)(1)(A): license grant 'limited to NonCommercial purposes only' when sharing Licensed Material.
Section 2(a)(1)(B): adapted material may be produced and shared 'for NonCommercial purposes only.'
Section 1(k): 'NonCommercial means not primarily intended for or directed towards commercial advantage or monetary compensation.'
Section 1(k) continued: NonCommercial definition covers exchange of material where no monetary compensation is involved.
Section 2(a)(1)(B): right to 'produce, reproduce, and Share Adapted Material for NonCommercial purposes only.'
Section 1(a): Adapted Material is defined as material derived from the Licensed Material.

permissions.commentary: Modification is permitted only for NonCommercial purposes. Adapted Material must then be shared under a compatible ShareAlike license (§3(b)).

citations.note: Section 2(a)(1)(A): right to 'reproduce and Share the Licensed Material ... for NonCommercial purposes only.'
Section 1(l): 'Share' includes reproduction, public display, public performance, distribution, dissemination, communication, or importation.

permissions.commentary: Distribution is permitted only for NonCommercial purposes.

citations.note: Section 2(a)(1): worldwide, royalty-free, non-exclusive, irrevocable license to exercise the Licensed Rights in the Licensed Material.
Section 2(b)(2): 'Patent and trademark rights are not licensed under this Public License.'

permissions.commentary: No patent license is granted. The license explicitly excludes patent rights (§2(b)(2)); use of the material does not carry an express patent grant from the licensor.

citations.note: Section 3(a)(1): 'If You Share the Licensed Material (including in modified form), You must:' (retention obligations follow).
Section 3(a)(1)(A)(ii): must retain 'a copyright notice'.
Section 3(a)(1)(A)(iii): must retain 'a notice that refers to this Public License'.
Section 3(a)(1)(A)(iv): must retain 'a notice that refers to the disclaimer of warranties'.
Section 3(a)(1)(C): must indicate the material is licensed under this Public License and include the text, URI, or hyperlink to it.
Section 3(a)(1)(B): 'indicate if You modified the Licensed Material and retain an indication of any previous modifications'.
Section 3(b): 'ShareAlike. In addition to the conditions in Section 3(a), if You Share Adapted Material You produce, the following conditions also apply.'
Section 3(b)(1): 'The Adapter's License You apply must be a Creative Commons license with the same License Elements, this version or later, or a BY-NC-SA Compatible License.'
Section 3(b)(2): must include the text of, or the URI or hyperlink to, the Adapter's License applied.
Section 1(g): 'The License Elements of this Public License are Attribution, NonCommercial, and ShareAlike.'
Section 3(a)(1): 'If You Share the Licensed Material (including in modified form), You must:'
Section 3(a)(1)(A)(i): must retain identification of the creator(s) and any others designated to receive attribution.
Section 3(a)(1)(A)(v): must retain a URI or hyperlink to the Licensed Material to the extent reasonably practicable.

Section 5(b): 'in no event will the Licensor be liable to You on any legal theory ... for any direct, special, indirect, incidental, consequential, punitive, exemplary, or other losses, costs, expenses, or damages'.
Section 5(b) continued: where a limitation is not allowed in full, it may not apply to You.
Section 5(a): 'the Licensor offers the Licensed Material as-is and as-available, and makes no representations or warranties of any kind'.
Section 5(a): disclaims warranties 'of title, merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement, absence of latent or other defects, accuracy, or the presence or absence of errors'.
Section 2(b)(2): 'Patent and trademark rights are not licensed under this Public License.'
Section 2(a)(6): no endorsement; nothing constitutes permission to assert connection with or sponsorship by the Licensor.
